Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x2000 "ESPIONAGE-2000" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Espionage.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
The JMP ($002D) instruction at $2092 was changed to JMP $F562 in order to remove the manual protection step.
As this game is actually frozen, the game starts at $21A0. However the true start address is $2000.
